summary: Public Completion System testing complete. All backend API tests passed (9/9 core tests). Frontend UI fully verified with token-based auto-resolve flow working end-to-end. The 3-step mobile-first flow (Find Order → Review → Confirm) works correctly with both closure modes (signed and confirmed_without_signature).

success_rate.backend: 100% (9/9 core tests passed, 6 skipped due to rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: Created test delivery notes with confirmation tokens for UI flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public Completion System fully verified. Key features: (1) Token-based access via /api/public/completion/token/{token} auto-resolves and skips to review step, (2) Phone lookup via /api/public/completion/phone/{phone} matches last 9 digits and excludes locked notes, (3) Order lookup via /api/public/completion/order/{order_number} returns order and linked delivery notes, (4) Public close via /api/public/completion/close/{dn_id} supports both signed and confirmed_without_signature modes with proper validation. Frontend URL: /confirm-completion with optional ?token=xyz query param.

details: GET /api/public/completion/token/{token} resolves delivery note by confirmation_token
Returns 404 for invalid/expired tokens
Token is auto-generated on delivery note creation
Public response excludes sensitive fields (confirmation_token, confirmed_by_user_id)
GET /api/public/completion/phone/{phone} returns pending delivery notes
Matches last 9 digits of phone number
Excludes locked/closed delivery notes
Also returns matching orders
GET /api/public/completion/order/{order_number} returns order and linked delivery notes
Returns 404 for invalid order numbers
Supports lookup by order_number or order ID
POST /api/public/completion/close/{dn_id} with closure_method=signed requires receiver_name and receiver_signature
Sets status=completed_signed and closure_locked=true
Returns 400 if signature missing
Returns 400 if receiver_name missing
POST /api/public/completion/close/{dn_id} with closure_method=confirmed_without_signature requires receiver_name and completion_note
Sets status=completed_confirmed and closure_locked=true
Stores authorization_source (in_person, phone, whatsapp, email)
Returns 400 if completion_note missing
POST /api/public/completion/close/{dn_id} returns 400 on already-locked notes
Error message mentions 'locked' or 'closed'
Mobile-first 3-step flow: Find Order → Review → Confirm
Step indicator shows progress (1, 2, 3)
Step 1: Phone/Order toggle tabs with search functionality
Step 1 with token: Auto-resolves and skips to review
Step 2: Review card shows delivery note details with Continue button
Step 3: Mode selection (Sign vs Confirm), receiver fields, signature pad or completion note
Success state shows completion recorded with details and Done link
Track Order page shows 'Confirm Delivery' CTA for dispatched/in_transit/shipped/awaiting_confirmation orders
CTA links to /confirm-completion?order={order_number}
CTA styled with amber border and green button
